title: ClusterInfo
description: BookKeeper cluster-wide status and bookie count information.

auditorElected.description: Whether an auditor has been elected.

auditorId.description: Socket address of the elected auditor.

clusterUnderReplicated.description: Whether any ledgers in the cluster are under-replicated.

totalBookiesCount.description: Total number of bookies in the cluster.

writableBookiesCount.description: Number of bookies available for writes.
